title: Mixed bag in Boland for Badgers Colts
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Led by Knysna Cavaliers...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Led by Knysna Cavaliers captain Hayden Sweet, the Garden Route Badgers Colts had mixed success during their recent trip to Paarl where they took on the Boland Colts in three-day and one-day matches.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Led by Knysna Cavaliers captain Hayden Sweet, the Garden Route Badgers Colts had mixed success during their recent trip to Paarl where they took on the Boland Colts in three-day and one-day matches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a series of matches that was hosted at Boland Park in Paarl, the Boland Colts won a thrilling three-day encounter on the last ball of the final day after they successfully chased a target of 176 – from 35 overs – with two wickets in hand.","html":"In a series of matches that was hosted at Boland Park in Paarl, the Boland Colts won a thrilling three-day encounter on the last ball of the final day after they successfully chased a target of 176 – from 35 overs – with two wickets in hand."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The three-day was played from 15 to 17 February and Sweet excelled with the bat with contributions of 80 in both the first and second innings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Liyabona Malife (6/91) and (3/47), who plays his club cricket for Pacaltsdorp United, bagged nine wickets in the match.","html":"Liyabona Malife (6/91) and (3/47), who plays his club cricket for Pacaltsdorp United, bagged nine wickets in the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the 50-over match on Sunday 18 February, the Badgers Colts amassed 257/7 thanks to half-centuries by Matthew Christensen (89) of Harlequins Forces and Heath Richards (55) of Pacaltsdorp United.","html":"In the 50-over match on Sunday 18 February, the Badgers Colts amassed 257/7 thanks to half-centuries by Matthew Christensen (89) of Harlequins Forces and Heath Richards (55) of Pacaltsdorp United."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thanks to match-winning bowling performances by Grant Esau (3/29) from Union Stars and Malife (4/49), Boland Colts were dismissed for 176 as the Badgers won by 81 runs.","html":"Thanks to match-winning bowling performances by Grant Esau (3/29) from Union Stars and Malife (4/49), Boland Colts were dismissed for 176 as the Badgers won by 81 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers player Mesuli Vuba contributed to the winning efforts with two wickets of his own.","html":"Knysna Cavaliers player Mesuli Vuba contributed to the winning efforts with two wickets of his own."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
